message:
🐛 Add missing icons to iconRegistry (Handshake, BadgeCheck, GitCommitHorizontal) (#9820)

BAA Tracker, Sigstore Verify, and SLSA Provenance nav items showed no
icon because Handshake, BadgeCheck and GitCommitHorizontal were missing
from the iconRegistry in lib/icons.ts.

Fixes #9798

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
